titleStmt.title: SII 24.530: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 530. (A.R. No. 45 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Registers an endowment of lands purchased for 80 poṉ by Nāgarāja, son of Achyutayyarāja, the tānāpati of Rāmadēvarāya, for food offerings to god Raṅganātha on the occasion of the deity's halt at the maṇḍapa on the banks of the Chandrapushkariṇi built by the donor himself, during the festivals conducted in the name of Kṛishṇappa Nāyakarayyaṉ and Viruppaṇa-uḍaiyār. At the end of the record is the label Śarvarājāvin sadā śērvai. The details of date viz., Śaka 1556, Śrīmukha, Mithuna, śu. 12, Friday, Chittirai correspond to A.D. 1633, June 7, Friday, the tithi was 10 (not 12) ·15, ·06.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī śakābdam 1000 5 100 5 10 6 Itaṉ mel cellāniṉṟa śrīmukhanāmasamvatsarattu midhuna nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu tuvāteciyum cukkiravāramum peṟṟa cittirai nakṣattirattuṉāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷaṉāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷaṉāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkam tiruppatip perumāḷ śrīraṅ
kaṉātadevar śrīpaṇṭārattukku Aṭiyeṉ rāmadevarāyar tāṉāpati Ācilāyiṉasūtrattu kevutama kottirattu Accutaiyya rācāviṉ puttiraṉ ṉākarācāveṉ teṇṭaṉ camaṟpittu poliyūṭṭu cilāsāśanam paṇṇik*kuṭuttapaṭi Āvatu . Eṉṉuṭaiya
Upaiyamāka cantirapuṟkkaraṇik karaiyil kaṭṭivitta maṇṭapattil Emperumāḷ Ēṟi yaṟuḷi Amutu ceytaruḷukiṟa vakai kiruṣṇappa nāyakkarayyaṉ tirunāḷ kaṭṭaḷaikku tiruvantikkarappukku neypaṭi (1/2) kku pu(1/2) kuṟuttukku Elam kku pu(1/2) Amutu ceytaruḷum poriyamutu 9 1000ḍakku poṉ 1pu8 Atiracam 100 5 10 kku poṉ
vaṭai 100 5 10kku poṉ 2pu1 tocai 100 5 10kku poṉ 2pu1 pāṉakak kūṉ 3 10 kku poṉ 3 cema kūli 2kku poṉ 1pu ciṟappu campā kū 10 6 kku poṉ 5 kaṟiyamutu teṅkāy paḻam kku pu cantaṇam paṭi 10 5 kku pu5 pākku 30kku veṟṟilai 5 100kku pu3 Ā poṉ 2 10 1 pa3 viruppaṇauṭaiyār tiruṉāḷ Añcām tiruṉāḷkkaṭṭaḷai Eṟiyaruḷa tiruvantikkāppukku ney
paṭi kku poṉ kuṟuttukku Ēlam kku pu Amutuceytaruḷum pori Amutu [ 3 100kku] poṉ 1 pu 6 Atiracam 3 100kku poṉ 8pu vaṭai 3 100kku poṉ 4 pu 2 tocai 3 100kku poṉ 4 pu 2 kkūṉ 3 100kku poṉ 3 pu pāṉakam kūṉ 3 100kku poṉ 3 cema 9 10 2kku poṉ 1pu6 ciṟappu campā � 4 10kku poṉ [10] ciṟappukku tayirvilai pu5 kaṟiyamutu viṭa pu3 vāḻaippaḻam
Much worn out. pon_ [10 1]
Āka ṉāḷ 1kku poṉ 1 Ā ṉāḷ 10kku poṉ 10 Āka poṉ
Amutu ceyta ruḷukiṟavakai poṉ 7 10 3 ṉācciyārammaṉ caṉṉati muṉ kkāl maṇṭapam toppil Aṭiyeṉuṭaiya Upaiyamākak kaṭṭuvitta kāl maṇ
mutal tiruṉāḷ Oṉṟukku Amutu ceytaruḷum pāṉakak kūṉ 5 10 5m (1/2)pu2 Iḷanīr
vakai poṉ 10kku poliyūṭṭāka koṇṭuviṭṭa teṉkarai rācakempira vaḷaṉāṭṭil pāṇṭimaṅkalattil Uḷkiṭai pūṉai muḻuṅki rūpāy 10 1 varuṣam 5 kku Utaiyam kāṇkiṟa poṉ 4 10000kku poṉ pu2 Ā vilaippaṭi poṉ 8 10 Intap poṉ
8 10 kku Inta nilam 1ṅm kovil śrīpaṇṭārattile viṭṭapaṭiyāl Āsanti rākkamāka cantirātittavaraiyum naṭakkak kaṭavararakavum . Ippaṭikku poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ perumāḷ śrīraṅ
kaṉāta cuvāmi śrīpaṇṭārattukku rāmadevarāyart taraṉāpati Accutaiyyarācāviṉ puttiraṉ nākarācāveṉ . Intap poliyūṭṭu śilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikku kovil kaṇakku śrīraṅkaṉārāyaṇa
priyaṉ Eḻuttu . sarvarājaviṉ sadā cervai §
Digital edition of SII 24.530 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
